changeSet.author: content
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE character_skill_proficiencies ADD COLUMN proficiency_level TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PROFICIENT'
ALTER TABLE character_skill_proficiencies ADD CONSTRAINT chk_character_skill_proficiency_level CHECK (proficiency_level IN ('PROFICIENT','EXPERTISE'))

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE character_skill_proficiencies DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_character_skill_proficiency_level
ALTER TABLE character_skill_proficiencies DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS proficiency_level

changeSet.author: content
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE class_level_reward_grant_skill_proficiency ADD COLUMN grants_expertise BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE class_level_reward_grant_skill_proficiency DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS grants_expertise
